checks.explanation: Sparse chronology handling is too weak for contradictory or partial material.
Contested items are not summarized separately from the main review flow.
Review surface does not clearly maintain read-only, non-reasoning posture.
Abstained or not-ready material is not visible enough in the review surface.
User-authored, support-note, and third-party source classes are not distinguishable enough.
Missing drill-down from fact/event rows to source statements and excerpts.
Review queue reasons are still too generic for operator triage.
Review surface does not clearly maintain read-only, non-reasoning posture.
User-authored, support-note, and third-party source classes are not distinguishable enough.
Support-worker handoff posture is not visible enough in the shared review surface.
